TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ukilul tu lalangawaw Ť∑üŤĎóŤíľŤ†ÖŤĶį "mukilul tu lalangaw, makatepat tu angtulay a cilis, " mukilul tu wadu' sa makatepa kisu tu balu, mukilul tu adipapang sa masanek ku balu nu bangsis" ." yu alahican, micapai kisu tu mahicaay a tademaw , palecad tu lula' , hida sa malalid nu calilaw kita. . sicabay tu nayay ku laheci a tademaw sa, masumad kisu inayay ku laheci. anu sicabay tu kapahay a tademaw sa, masumad kisu kanamuhan. . anu sicabay tu dedep sananay haw, malalid makasic. sicabay tu kasenengan a tademaw, masumad kisu malaluk misaicelang. . sisa , macapi ku sumanahay, micapi ku lumeni'ay. .
S.PHON: ukir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawaw ***** "mukir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw, makat…ôpat tu aŇčtur~…ĺaj a ¶ir~…ĺis, " mukir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu wadu Ē~ ° sa makat…ôpa kisu tu bar~…ĺu, mukir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu adipapaŇč sa masan…ôk ku bar~…ĺu nu baŇčsis" ." ju ar~…ĺańßi ¶an, mi ¶apai kisu tu mańßi ¶aaj a tad…ômaw , par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu r~…ĺur~…ĺa Ē~ ° , ńßida sa mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw kita. . si ¶abaj tu najaj ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i a tad…ômaw sa, masumad kisu inajaj ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i. anu si ¶abaj tu kapańßaj a tad…ômaw sa, masumad kisu kanamuńßan. . anu si ¶abaj tu d…ôd…ôp sananaj ńßaw, mar~…ĺar~…ĺid makasi ¶. si ¶abaj tu kas…ôn…ôŇčan a tad…ômaw, masumad kisu mar~…ĺar~…ĺuk misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč. . sisa , ma ¶api ku sumanańßaj, mi ¶api ku r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj. .
S.FORM: ukilul tu lalangawaw Ť∑üŤĎóŤíľŤ†ÖŤĶį "mukilul tu lalangaw, makatepat tu angtulay a cilis, " mukilul tu wadu' sa makatepa kisu tu balu, mukilul tu adipapang sa masanek ku balu nu bangsis" ." yu alahican, micapai kisu tu mahicaay a tademaw , palecad tu lula' , hida sa malalid nu calilaw kita. . sicabay tu nayay ku laheci a tademaw sa, masumad kisu inayay ku laheci. anu sicabay tu kapahay a tademaw sa, masumad kisu kanamuhan. . anu sicabay tu dedep sananay haw, malalid makasic. sicabay tu kasenengan a tademaw, masumad kisu malaluk misaicelang. . sisa , macapi ku sumanahay, micapi ku lumeni'ay. .
